- [ ] replicated
- [ ] hypothesis
- [ ] estimate

## Summary

Describe the smallest defensible claim this PR supports.

## Verification

- [ ] `scripts/ci_hygiene.sh`
- [ ] corpus audit, if a private corpus was generated
- [ ] clean-clone reproduction, if this PR supports a public claim

## Skeptic Review

List the strongest reasons this result may be misleading, weak, or overclaimed.

## Publication Boundary

- [ ] This PR is evidence collection only.
- [ ] This PR requests a lab note.
- [ ] This PR requests a release candidate.

Final release, arXiv, conference, and Hacker News publication require explicit
human approval.
